problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
